'''Torsha Dawun''' was an [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who owned [[Meirm Speeder Emporium]] in [[Meirm City]] on [[Sriluur/Legends|Sriluur]]. She was one of the few non-natives that both the [[Houk/Legends|Houk]] and [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] of Sriluur respected.

{{Char-stub}}
